response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performers as Aki Rosenthal, Ceres Fauna, Hakos Baelz, and Nanashi Mumei. 2. Identified the song title as 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE' from the on-screen text. 3. Used the search tool to confirm the song and find the official lyrics. The original artist is 'Hokago Tea Time'. 4. Segmented the video into the performance (00:00-02:40) and the talk segment (02:40-03:20). 5. Compiled the lyrics and metadata for the JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of the song 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE' by four VTubers, followed by a talk segment.

scenes.description: The four VTubers (Aki Rosenthal, Ceres Fauna, Hakos Baelz, and Nanashi Mumei) perform the song 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We love everyone!!
Endless continuation, lalala, Miracle Sing Time
Sing, sing, the strongest way to convey love
Even with a clumsy song, even with subtle lyrics
I want to deliver my soul, with all my might
What should I do? It's decided automatically
I can't keep up with the timetable
Dreams are infinite, things I want to do, I'll dash through the roaring hallway to gather
If my manners are bad, sorry! But I'll do it without caring about appearances
Immersed, I'll fall into it, play. Is this perhaps youth?
Ever ever... forever shine
I really love you!!
Tension rising, lalala, powerful gig time
Heart, heart, a genius searching for excitement
Even if they say 'Huh!?', even with consecutive misses
I want to release the brave that wells up
I'll start a tremolo, answering with a flam
It's okay, it's okay, isn't it great to be excited?
Happy is always, 'now', something you feel
Live, maiden, with instinct, naked
No matter what, it's a more important task than homework
After-school tea, chatting, practice
Humor, natural, dizzying laughter, my stomach hurts from laughing too much
Breathing (in) perfectly, excellent! But there was still a riff I was bad at
Will you accompany me for special training? A little more until the curfew, because I don't want to go home
Never never... can't say good-bye
I really, really love you!!
Transcendent, deeply in love, lalala, wonderful show time
Music, music, it's just like us
Standing ovation award, even without an audience
I want to play, the real of the moment
Yesterday's regrets, tomorrow's worries
To be honest, to be honest, who benefits? What's the gain?
Lucky is always, 'now', something you grasp
Be greedy, maiden, it won't be given to you, farewell
Not written in any book, you won't be taught in class
But I'll never forget it for the rest of my life
If we sing together, the miracle I thought didn't exist in this world
I can believe, I can become stronger
We love everyone!!
Endless continuation, lalala, Miracle Sing Time
Sing, sing, the strongest way to convey love
Even with a clumsy song, even with subtle lyrics
I want to deliver my soul, with all my might, my life-sized life
Is today like yesterday? Is tomorrow like today?
It's okay, it's okay, if it's fun, it's the right answer
Lockers are always, 'now', in their naughty prime
Advance, maiden, hold it, hope
Thank you for the love, love, love
I'll sing, I'll sing, putting my heart into it, I'll sing today too
Thank you for the love, love, love
I'll sing, I'll sing, putting my love into it, I'll sing forever

scenes.description: The two VTubers talk to the audience and ask them to hold on while the channel is switched.
